前世，我是预言灾变的“先知”，却被视为废棋抛弃。
重生回到能力选择那天，我冷笑放弃了预知未来。
这次，我选了绝对安全屋。
外面妖兽撕裂苍穹，绝望哀嚎遍野。
我透过观景窗欣赏这场毁灭。
曾奉我为神的高层在捶打我的屋门，鲜血在他们身后漫延。我轻晃酒杯，抿了一口。
“上一次，我燃烧自己照亮你们的路。”
“这一次，我只亲手记录，文明如何死去。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4333490d37fc4a64a5a28c9a6de35465","author":"醉半夏","author_id":"","book_id":"7566112885290585112","book_name":"我选安全屋，人类联盟后悔了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"18.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7568689425379508761","read_count":"183159","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"159804"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.4","serial_count":"73","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,求生,囤物资,黑化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2od0b5498529b273fc83d944e590168187~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779332903&x-signature=b4evOUQXbu3XX0UPq1EmiFk7S30%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3060645155310455","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"91"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322110823E9A2CC559303774C929C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_d
